top3.sql:
WITH pre_june AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS pre_june_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_number BETWEEN 24 AND 27  -- 4 weeks leading up to June 15 (week ~28)
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
post_june AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS post_june_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_number BETWEEN 28 AND 31  -- 4 weeks fo...

WITH sales_before AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS total_sales_before
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_number BETWEEN 24 AND 27  -- Weeks leading up to June 15 (approx. weeks 24-27)
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
sales_after AS (

        SUM(sales) AS total_sales_after
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
